sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94990" key="sklhroke/falon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρο-κέφᾰλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n94990.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spider</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:15:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
